/usr/bin/ar qc libbattle_core.a CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/IO/AbilityData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/IO/BattleSession.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/IO/BattleToJson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/IO/BuildFromJson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/IO/ItemData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/IO/MoveData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/Abilities.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/Battle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/BattleActions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/BattleContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/BattleMath.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/BattleQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/Effect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/EventSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/Field.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/GameRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/Items.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/MoveEffectHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/Moves.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/Natures.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/PRNG.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/Pokemon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/Side.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/Status.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/Utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/battle/Weather.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/tests/ItemTestRunner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/battle_core.dir/src/tests/MoveTestRunner.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libbattle_core.a
